expectations.text: Uses correct imports: Agent, RunContext from pydantic_ai and BaseModel from pydantic
expectations.evidence: Line 3: from pydantic import BaseModel, Field; Line 4: from pydantic_ai import Agent. No RunContext imported since tool_plain used (valid choice).

expectations.text: Agent has output_type set to a BaseModel with product_name, price, and confidence_score fields
expectations.evidence: Line 33: output_type=ProductResult. ProductResult (line 19-28) has product_name, price, confidence_score fields.

expectations.text: Uses @agent.tool or @agent.tool_plain decorator for tool registration
Tool function has a docstring with parameter descriptions
expectations.evidence: Lines 44-52: Docstring with Args section describing query parameter.

expectations.text: All functions have full type annotations (params and return types)
expectations.evidence: search_products(query: str) -> str, main() -> None. All annotated.

expectations.text: confidence_score field is constrained to 0-1 range (ge=0, le=1 or similar)
